case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SETH LEE QUINN MALONE et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALONE, SETH LEE QUINN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 SIXTH STEET, #209, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
